name: USS Abraham Lincoln
aircraft: F/A-18E/F Super Hornets, EA-18G Growlers, E-2D Hawkeye
notes: Primary strike platform for Operation Epic Fury. Positioned in Gulf of Oman to project power through Strait of Hormuz.

name: USS Gerald R. Ford
aircraft: F/A-18E/F Super Hornets, F-35C Lightning II, EA-18G Growlers
status: Engaged — supporting strikes on Hezbollah targets and Iranian western approaches
notes: Eastern Mediterranean positioning. Dual mission: Lebanon front support and long-range strikes into western Iran.

name: USS George H.W. Bush
aircraft: F/A-18E/F Super Hornets, EA-18G Growlers, E-2D Hawkeye
notes: Arabian Sea positioning. Covering southern Iranian coast and providing depth to the carrier screen.
